YieldMax® Introduces Option Income Strategy ETF on Circle Internet Group, Inc. (CRCL)

holdings.infoBox: CRCO is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax CRCL Option Income Strategy ETF (CRCO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Circle Internet Group, Inc. stock (NYSE: CRCL) through a synthetic covered call strategy CRCO was launched on Sep 29, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
